creator: kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
text:
Sorry my poor English.

  I have tested 'gnats' port in ports-current.  But it seems that the
port installed 'man' pages instead of 'cat' pages.
  This port was updated on Jan 20 and Jan 24.  If a port you used is not
latest one, please check it and report filenames which is installed as
'cat' pages.

  Thanks.


-- 
Jun Kuriyama // kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
